reasons: localized public Atlas route and native form semantics
Public Content Envelope Atlas dataset interface
server-owned query normalization, filtering, sorting and pagination
bilingual URL-state preservation and no-JavaScript discovery

reproducibility.detail: The Slice 3 implementation has not yet completed Linux and Windows clean-checkout CI from an immutable commit.

static_correctness.detail: Web lint, TypeScript typecheck, production build and release-gate ownership and trust checks pass locally.

public_contracts.detail: The localized Atlas uses canonical URL state for q, status, sex, facility, completeness, sort and page; invalid, unsupported and repeated values are normalized by permanent redirect; browser history and locale switching preserve compatible task state.

media_and_content_truth.detail: Results are limited to reviewed pandas with trusted profile destinations, use only auditable relevance, name and birth sorting, distinguish complete and partial records and truthful media states, and preserve country-level location precision when no reviewed facility exists.
evidence: Mei Xiang remains labeled China country-level rather than an inferred facility
legacy popularity and featured presenters deleted

browser_journeys.detail: The complete 35-test production browser suite covers search-to-profile navigation, combined filters, deterministic sorting, pagination and history restore, invalid URL normalization, bilingual state preservation, keyboard submission, mobile layout and no-JavaScript results.
evidence: targeted Atlas and trust-spine suites: 22/22 PASS

automated_accessibility.detail: Desktop and 320-pixel mobile axe WCAG A/AA scans cover Chinese and English Atlas discovery, with native keyboard-operable form controls, no horizontal overflow and reduced-motion verification.
evidence: Chinese and English Atlas discovery desktop/mobile axe journeys: PASS

visual_regression.detail: No immutable Slice 3 Staging deployment and named visual review are yet bound to this implementation.

performance_budgets.detail: The production build reports 107 kB First Load JS for the localized Atlas, below the Slice 3 route budget of 170 KiB.

staging.detail: An immutable Cloudflare Staging deployment, bundle checksum and Staging browser/accessibility results are not yet recorded for Slice 3.

human_signoff.detail: Named product-owner review of bilingual filters, result summaries, pagination, mobile reflow and URL sharing is not yet recorded for Slice 3.

release_decision.detail: Local implementation evidence is complete, but clean-checkout CI, immutable Staging identity and named Slice 3 review remain incomplete. This manifest must not be interpreted as release GO.
